42	  const { locale } = useParams({ from: '/$locale' });
43	  const completionToken = useRef(0);
44	
45	  const configRoundIndex = roundOrder[roundIndex];
46	  const round =
47	    configRoundIndex === undefined
48	      ? undefined
49	      : sortNumbersConfig.rounds[configRoundIndex];
50	
51	  const directionLabel =
52	    sortNumbersConfig.direction === 'ascending'
53	      ? t('sort-numbers-ui.ascending-label')
54	      : t('sort-numbers-ui.descending-label');
55	
56	  useRoundTTS(directionLabel);
57	
58	  const handleHome = () => {
59	    void navigate({ to: '/$locale', params: { locale } });
60	  };
61	
62	  const handlePlayAgain = () => {
63	    onRestartSession();
64	  };
65	
66	  useEffect(() => {
67	    if (phase !== 'round-complete') return;
68	
69	    const token = ++completionToken.current;
70	    const delayMs = 750;
71	    const timer = globalThis.setTimeout(() => {
72	      if (completionToken.current !== token) return;
73	
74	      const isLastRound = roundIndex >= roundOrder.length - 1;
75	      if (isLastRound) {
76	        dispatch({ type: 'COMPLETE_GAME' });
77	        return;
78	      }
79	
80	      const nextConfigIndex = roundOrder[roundIndex + 1];
81	      const nextRound =
82	        nextConfigIndex === undefined
83	          ? undefined
84	          : sortNumbersConfig.rounds[nextConfigIndex];
85	
86	      if (!nextRound) {
87	        dispatch({ type: 'COMPLETE_GAME' });
88	        return;
89	      }
90	
91	      const { tiles, zones } = buildSortRound(
92	        nextRound.sequence,
93	        sortNumbersConfig.direction,
94	      );
95	      dispatch({ type: 'ADVANCE_ROUND', tiles, zones });
96	    }, delayMs);
97	
98	    return () => {
99	      globalThis.clearTimeout(timer);
100	    };
101	  }, [
102	    phase,
103	    roundIndex,
104	    dispatch,
105	    roundOrder,
106	    sortNumbersConfig.rounds,
107	    sortNumbersConfig.direction,
108	  ]);
109	
110	  if (showInstructions) {
111	    return (

116	      />

121	
122	  return (

124	      <div className="flex w-full max-w-2xl flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-4 py-6">
125	        <AnswerGame.Question>

143	        />
144	      ) : null}

149	export const SortNumbers = ({ config }: SortNumbersProps) => {
150	  const roundsInOrder = config.roundsInOrder === true;
151	  const [sessionEpoch, setSessionEpoch] = useState(0);
152	
153	  const roundOrder = useMemo(() => {
154	    void sessionEpoch;
155	    return buildRoundOrder(config.rounds.length, roundsInOrder);
156	  }, [config.rounds.length, roundsInOrder, sessionEpoch]);
157	
158	  const firstConfigIndex = roundOrder[0];
159	  const round0 =
160	    firstConfigIndex === undefined
161	      ? undefined
162	      : config.rounds[firstConfigIndex];
163	
164	  const { tiles, zones } = useMemo(() => {
165	    if (!round0) {
166	      return { tiles: [] as TileItem[], zones: [] as AnswerZone[] };
167	    }
168	    return buildSortRound(round0.sequence, config.direction);
169	  }, [round0, config.direction]);
170	
171	  const answerGameConfig = useMemo(
172	    (): AnswerGameConfig => ({
173	      gameId: config.gameId,
174	      inputMethod: config.inputMethod,
175	      wrongTileBehavior: config.wrongTileBehavior,
176	      tileBankMode: config.tileBankMode,
177	      totalRounds: config.rounds.length,
178	      roundsInOrder: config.roundsInOrder,
179	      ttsEnabled: config.ttsEnabled,
180	      initialTiles: tiles,
181	      initialZones: zones,
182	    }),
183	    [
184	      config.gameId,
185	      config.inputMethod,
186	      config.wrongTileBehavior,
187	      config.tileBankMode,
188	      config.rounds.length,
189	      config.roundsInOrder,
190	      config.ttsEnabled,
191	      tiles,
192	      zones,
193	    ],
194	  );
195	
196	  if (!round0) return null;
197	
198	  return (
199	    <AnswerGame config={answerGameConfig}>
200	      <SortNumbersSession
201	        sortNumbersConfig={config}
202	        roundOrder={roundOrder}
203	        onRestartSession={() => {
204	          setSessionEpoch((e) => e + 1);
205	        }}
206	      />

1	import { dropTargetForElements } from '@atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop/element/adapter';
2	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { useAnswerGameContext } from '@/components/answer-game/useAnswerGameContext';
4	import { useTileEvaluation } from '@/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation';
5	
6	const NumberSlot = ({
7	  zoneIndex,
8	  label,
9	  isActive,
10	  isWrong,
11	}: {
12	  zoneIndex: number;
13	  label: string | null;
14	  isActive: boolean;
15	  isWrong: boolean;
16	}) => {
17	  const ref = useRef<HTMLLIElement>(null);
18	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
19	
20	  useEffect(() => {
21	    const element = ref.current;
22	    if (!element) return;
23	    return dropTargetForElements({
24	      element,
25	      getData: () => ({ zoneIndex }),
26	      onDrop: ({ source }) => {
27	        const tileId = source.data['tileId'];
28	        if (typeof tileId === 'string') placeTile(tileId, zoneIndex);
29	      },
30	    });
31	  }, [zoneIndex, placeTile]);
32	
33	  const ariaLabel = label
34	    ? `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, filled with ${label}`
35	    : `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, empty`;
36	
37	  return (
38	    <li
39	      ref={ref}
40	      aria-label={ariaLabel}
41	      data-active={isActive || undefined}
42	      data-wrong={isWrong || undefined}
43	      className={[
44	        'flex size-14 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 text-2xl font-bold transition-all',
45	        'border-border',
46	        isActive && !label
47	          ? 'animate-pulse ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2'
48	          : '',
49	        isWrong
50	          ? 'border-destructive bg-destructive/10 text-destructive'
51	          : '',
52	        label && !isWrong
53	          ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary'
54	          : '',
55	      ]
56	        .filter(Boolean)
57	        .join(' ')}
58	    >
59	      {label ?? ''}
60	    </li>
61	  );
62	};
63	
64	export const NumberSequenceSlots = () => {
65	  const { zones, activeSlotIndex, allTiles } = useAnswerGameContext();
66	
67	  return (
68	    <ol
69	      aria-label="Answer slots"
70	      className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2"
71	    >
72	      {zones.map((zone, i) => {
73	        const placedTile = zone.placedTileId
74	          ? allTiles.find((t) => t.id === zone.placedTileId)
75	          : null;
76	        return (
77	          <NumberSlot
78	            key={zone.id}
79	            zoneIndex={i}
80	            label={placedTile?.label ?? null}
81	            isActive={
82	              i === activeSlotIndex && zone.placedTileId === null
83	            }
84	            isWrong={zone.isWrong}
85	          />
86	        );
87	      })}
88	    </ol>
89	  );
90	};
91

1	import type {
2	  AnswerGameAction,
3	  AnswerGameConfig,
4	  AnswerGameState,
5	  AnswerZone,
6	  TileItem,
7	} from './types';
8	
9	export function makeInitialState(
10	  config: AnswerGameConfig,
11	): AnswerGameState {
12	  return {
13	    config,
14	    allTiles: [],
15	    bankTileIds: [],
16	    zones: [],
17	    activeSlotIndex: 0,
18	    dragActiveTileId: null,
19	    phase: 'playing',
20	    roundIndex: 0,
21	    retryCount: 0,
22	  };
23	}
24	
25	export function answerGameReducer(
26	  state: AnswerGameState,
27	  action: AnswerGameAction,
28	): AnswerGameState {
29	  switch (action.type) {
30	    case 'INIT_ROUND': {
31	      return {
32	        ...state,
33	        allTiles: action.tiles,
34	        bankTileIds: action.tiles.map((t: TileItem) => t.id),
35	        zones: action.zones,
36	        activeSlotIndex: 0,
37	        phase: 'playing',
38	        roundIndex: 0,
39	        retryCount: 0,
40	      };
41	    }
42	
43	    case 'PLACE_TILE': {
44	      const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === action.tileId);
45	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
46	      if (!tile || !zone) return state;
47	
48	      const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
49	
50	      if (!correct && state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject') {
51	        return { ...state, retryCount: state.retryCount + 1 };
52	      }
53	
54	      if (correct) {
55	        const previousId = zone.placedTileId;
56	        let newBankTileIds = state.bankTileIds.filter(
57	          (id) => id !== action.tileId,
58	        );
59	        if (previousId !== null && previousId !== action.tileId) {
60	          // Bank tile dropped on an occupied slot: previous occupant returns to bank.
61	          newBankTileIds = [...newBankTileIds, previousId];
62	        }
63	        const newZone: AnswerZone = {
64	          ...zone,
65	          placedTileId: action.tileId,
66	          isWrong: false,
67	          isLocked: false,
68	        };
69	        const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) =>
70	          i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
71	        );
72	        const nextActiveSlot = newZones.findIndex(
73	          (z, i) => i > action.zoneIndex && z.placedTileId === null,
74	        );
75	        const allFilledCorrectly = newZones.every(
76	          (z) => z.placedTileId !== null && !z.isWrong,
77	        );
78	        return {
79	          ...state,
80	          zones: newZones,
81	          bankTileIds: newBankTileIds,
82	          activeSlotIndex:
83	            nextActiveSlot === -1
84	              ? state.activeSlotIndex
85	              : nextActiveSlot,
86	          retryCount: state.retryCount,
87	          phase: allFilledCorrectly ? 'round-complete' : 'playing',
88	        };
89	      }
90	
91	      const lockManual =
92	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-manual';
93	      const newZone: AnswerZone = {
94	        ...zone,
95	        placedTileId: lockManual ? action.tileId : zone.placedTileId,
96	        isWrong: true,
97	        isLocked: true,
98	      };
99	      const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) =>
100	        i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
101	      );
102	      const newBankTileIds = lockManual
103	        ? state.bankTileIds.filter((id) => id !== action.tileId)
104	        : state.bankTileIds;
105	
106	      return {
107	        ...state,
108	        zones: newZones,
109	        bankTileIds: newBankTileIds,
110	        activeSlotIndex: state.activeSlotIndex,
111	        retryCount: state.retryCount + 1,
112	        phase: 'playing',
113	      };
114	    }
115	
116	    case 'REMOVE_TILE': {
117	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
118	      if (!zone?.placedTileId) return state;
119	      return {
120	        ...state,
121	        zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
122	          i === action.zoneIndex
123	            ? {
124	                ...z,
125	                placedTileId: null,
126	                isWrong: false,
127	                isLocked: false,
128	              }
129	            : z,
130	        ),
131	        bankTileIds: [...state.bankTileIds, zone.placedTileId],
132	      };
133	    }
134	
135	    case 'SWAP_TILES': {
136	      const fromZone = state.zones[action.fromZoneIndex];
137	      const toZone = state.zones[action.toZoneIndex];
138	      if (!fromZone || !toZone) return state;
139	      return {
140	        ...state,
141	        zones: state.zones.map((z, i) => {
142	          if (i === action.fromZoneIndex)
143	            return { ...z, placedTileId: toZone.placedTileId };
144	          if (i === action.toZoneIndex)
145	            return { ...z, placedTileId: fromZone.placedTileId };
146	          return z;
147	        }),
148	      };
149	    }
150	
151	    case 'EJECT_TILE': {
152	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
153	      if (!zone) return state;
154	
155	      // Guard: never eject a correctly-placed tile (isWrong=false, isLocked=false)
156	      if (!zone.isWrong && !zone.isLocked) return state;
157	
158	      if (zone.placedTileId) {
159	        return {
160	          ...state,
161	          zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
162	            i === action.zoneIndex
163	              ? {
164	                  ...z,
165	                  placedTileId: null,
166	                  isWrong: false,
167	                  isLocked: false,
168	                }
169	              : z,
170	          ),
171	          bankTileIds: [...state.bankTileIds, zone.placedTileId],
172	        };
173	      }
174	
175	      return {
176	        ...state,
177	        zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
178	          i === action.zoneIndex
179	            ? {
180	                ...z,
181	                placedTileId: null,
182	                isWrong: false,
183	                isLocked: false,
184	              }
185	            : z,
186	        ),
187	      };
188	    }
189	
190	    case 'ADVANCE_ROUND': {
191	      return {
192	        ...state,
193	        allTiles: action.tiles,
194	        bankTileIds: action.tiles.map((t: TileItem) => t.id),
195	        zones: action.zones,
196	        activeSlotIndex: 0,
197	        phase: 'playing',
198	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex + 1,
199	        retryCount: 0,
200	      };
201	    }
202	
203	    case 'COMPLETE_GAME': {
204	      return { ...state, phase: 'game-over' };
205	    }
206	
207	    case 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE': {
208	      return { ...state, dragActiveTileId: action.tileId };
209	    }
210	
211	    default: {
212	      return state;
213	    }
214	  }
215	}

1	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
3	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
4	import { playSound } from '@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback';
5	import { getGameEventBus } from '@/lib/game-event-bus';
6	
7	const AUTO_EJECT_DELAY_MS = 1000;
8	
9	export interface TileEvaluation {
10	  placeTile: (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
11	}
12	
13	export function useTileEvaluation(): TileEvaluation {
14	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
15	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
16	  const ejectionTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(
17	    null,
18	  );
19	
20	  const clearEjectionTimer = useCallback(() => {
21	    if (ejectionTimerRef.current !== null) {
22	      clearTimeout(ejectionTimerRef.current);
23	      ejectionTimerRef.current = null;
24	    }
25	  }, []);
26	
27	  useEffect(() => () => clearEjectionTimer(), [clearEjectionTimer]);
28	
29	  const placeTile = useCallback(
30	    (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => {
31	      clearEjectionTimer();
32	
33	      const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
34	      const zone = state.zones[zoneIndex];
35	      if (!tile || !zone) return;
36	
37	      const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
38	      playSound(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong', 0.8);
39	      dispatch({ type: 'PLACE_TILE', tileId, zoneIndex });
40	
41	      getGameEventBus().emit({
42	        type: 'game:evaluate',
43	        gameId: state.config.gameId,
44	        sessionId: '',
45	        profileId: '',
46	        timestamp: Date.now(),
47	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
48	        answer: tileId,
49	        correct,
50	        nearMiss: false,
51	      });
52	
53	      if (
54	        !correct &&
55	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-auto-eject'
56	      ) {
57	        ejectionTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
58	          dispatch({ type: 'EJECT_TILE', zoneIndex });
59	          ejectionTimerRef.current = null;
60	        }, AUTO_EJECT_DELAY_MS);
61	      }
62	    },
63	    [state, dispatch, clearEjectionTimer],
64	  );
65	
66	  return { placeTile };
67	}
68

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-03 21:51:10Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the bug. Let me trace through the `lock-manual` behavior:

1. When a wrong tile is placed with `lock-manual`:
   - `PLACE_TILE` action is dispatched
   - In the reducer, the zone gets `placedTileId: action.tileId`, `isWrong: true`, `isLocked: true`
   - The tile is removed from `bankTileIds`

2. The issue: the tile is placed in the zone as "wrong and locked", but there's no mechanism for the user to manually remove it and bring it back to the bank. 

The `EJECT_TILE` action exists but never fires in `lock-manual` mode—only `lock-auto-eject` triggers auto-ejection. So the tile gets stuck in the zone permanently. I need to add a click handler to wrong/locked zones that dispatches `EJECT_TILE` when clicked, letting users manually remove the misplaced tile.
</details></think>

1	import { dropTargetForElements } from '@atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop/element/adapter';
2	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { useAnswerGameContext } from '@/components/answer-game/useAnswerGameContext';
4	import { useTileEvaluation } from '@/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation';
5	
6	const LetterSlot = ({
7	  zoneIndex,
8	  label,
9	  isActive,
10	  isWrong,
11	}: {
12	  zoneIndex: number;
13	  label: string | null;
14	  isActive: boolean;
15	  isWrong: boolean;
16	}) => {
17	  const ref = useRef<HTMLLIElement>(null);
18	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
19	
20	  useEffect(() => {
21	    const element = ref.current;
22	    if (!element) return;
23	    return dropTargetForElements({
24	      element,
25	      getData: () => ({ zoneIndex }),
26	      onDrop: ({ source }) => {
27	        const tileId = source.data['tileId'];
28	        if (typeof tileId === 'string') placeTile(tileId, zoneIndex);
29	      },
30	    });
31	  }, [zoneIndex, placeTile]);
32	
33	  const ariaLabel = label
34	    ? `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, filled with ${label}`
35	    : `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, empty`;
36	
37	  return (
38	    <li
39	      ref={ref}
40	      aria-label={ariaLabel}
41	      data-active={isActive || undefined}
42	      data-wrong={isWrong || undefined}
43	      className={[
44	        'flex size-14 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 text-2xl font-bold transition-all',
45	        'border-border',
46	        isActive && !label
47	          ? 'ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 animate-pulse'
48	          : '',
49	        isWrong
50	          ? 'border-destructive bg-destructive/10 text-destructive'
51	          : '',
52	        label && !isWrong
53	          ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary'
54	          : '',
55	      ]
56	        .filter(Boolean)
57	        .join(' ')}
58	    >
59	      {label ?? ''}
60	    </li>
61	  );
62	};
63	
64	export const OrderedLetterSlots = () => {
65	  const { zones, activeSlotIndex, allTiles } = useAnswerGameContext();
66	
67	  return (
68	    <ol
69	      aria-label="Answer slots"
70	      className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2"
71	    >
72	      {zones.map((zone, i) => {
73	        const placedTile = zone.placedTileId
74	          ? allTiles.find((t) => t.id === zone.placedTileId)
75	          : null;
76	        return (
77	          <LetterSlot
78	            key={zone.id}
79	            zoneIndex={i}
80	            label={placedTile?.label ?? null}
81	            isActive={
82	              i === activeSlotIndex && zone.placedTileId === null
83	            }
84	            isWrong={zone.isWrong}
85	          />
86	        );
87	      })}
88	    </ol>
89	  );
90	};

2	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

6	
7	const NumberSlot = ({
8	  zoneIndex,
9	  label,
10	  isActive,
11	  isWrong,
12	}: {
13	  zoneIndex: number;
14	  label: string | null;
15	  isActive: boolean;
16	  isWrong: boolean;
17	}) => {
18	  const ref = useRef<HTMLLIElement>(null);
19	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
20	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
21	
22	  useEffect(() => {
23	    const element = ref.current;
24	    if (!element) return;
25	    return dropTargetForElements({
26	      element,
27	      getData: () => ({ zoneIndex }),
28	      onDrop: ({ source }) => {
29	        const tileId = source.data['tileId'];
30	        if (typeof tileId === 'string') placeTile(tileId, zoneIndex);
31	      },
32	    });
33	  }, [zoneIndex, placeTile]);
34	
35	  const ariaLabel = label
36	    ? `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, filled with ${label}`
37	    : `Slot ${zoneIndex + 1}, empty`;
38	
39	  const handleClick = () => {
40	    if (isWrong) dispatch({ type: 'EJECT_TILE', zoneIndex });
41	  };
42	
43	  return (
44	    <li
45	      ref={ref}
46	      aria-label={ariaLabel}
47	      data-active={isActive || undefined}
48	      data-wrong={isWrong || undefined}
49	      onClick={isWrong ? handleClick : undefined}
50	      className={[
51	        'flex size-14 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 text-2xl font-bold transition-all',
52	        'border-border',
53	        isActive && !label
54	          ? 'animate-pulse ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2'
55	          : '',
56	        isWrong
57	          ? 'cursor-pointer border-destructive bg-destructive/10 text-destructive'
58	          : '',
59	        label && !isWrong
60	          ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary'
61	          : '',
62	      ]
63	        .filter(Boolean)
64	        .join(' ')}
65	    >
66	      {label ?? ''}
67	    </li>
68	  );
69	};
70	
71	export const NumberSequenceSlots = () => {
72	  const { zones, activeSlotIndex, allTiles } = useAnswerGameContext();
73	
74	  return (
75	    <ol
76	      aria-label="Answer slots"
77	      className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2"
78	    >
79	      {zones.map((zone, i) => {
80	        const placedTile = zone.placedTileId
81	          ? allTiles.find((t) => t.id === zone.placedTileId)
82	          : null;
83	        return (
84	          <NumberSlot
85	            key={zone.id}
86	            zoneIndex={i}
87	            label={placedTile?.label ?? null}
88	            isActive={
89	              i === activeSlotIndex && zone.placedTileId === null
90	            }
91	            isWrong={zone.isWrong}
92	          />
93	        );
94	      })}
95	    </ol>
96	  );
97	};

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-03 21:54:06Z)**_

`useAnswerGameContext` is used in `NumberSequenceSlots` (the outer component, line 72) so the import is still needed. The fix looks correct.

The bug was that both `NumberSlot` and `LetterSlot` had no way to trigger `EJECT_TILE` for `lock-manual` mode. The fixes:

- [NumberSequenceSlots.tsx](worktrees/feat-word-spell-number-match/src/games/sort-numbers/NumberSequenceSlots/NumberSequenceSlots.tsx) — clicking a wrong slot now dispatches `EJECT_TILE`, returning the tile to the bank
- [OrderedLetterSlots.tsx](worktrees/feat-word-spell-number-match/src/games/word-spell/OrderedLetterSlots/OrderedLetterSlots.tsx) — same fix for word-spell

The `EJECT_TILE` reducer already has the guard `if (!zone.isWrong && !zone.isLocked) return state` so correctly-placed tiles can't be accidentally ejected. Wrong slots also now show `cursor-pointer` to hint that they're clickable.
